description: Implement the feature with secure coding practices. On first run, proceed with the implementation. After a security audit runs and produces findings in the 'security-gate/findings' artefact, this task will be reset to pending for remediation — on subsequent runs the findings are injected into the prompt so you can fix any reported vulnerabilities.

Run a security audit against the implementation. Detects dependency vulnerabilities via cargo-audit (Rust) or npm audit (Node). Findings are persisted as a JSON artefact so the implementation task can consume them when remediating. The task fails (and resets the implementation task to pending) when critical or high severity vulnerabilities are found.
